title: Minecraft Unleashed: Client
description: That's a optimized MC with a beatiful visual stuff for playing on server, vanilla-like, doesn't affect gameplay, client.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32b6ee3a0d2ab6a66b3d27fe6930398d34457050_0.webp)

**Version:** 1.21.1 (Fabric) | **Planned Ports:** NeoForge, 1.20.1 (Fabric/Forge)  
*Crafted entirely by a solo developer, this modpack blends moddability, performance, and vanilla-friendly design.*  

---

## **What is Minecraft Unleashed?**  
Experience Minecraft reimagined with **buttery-smooth performance**, **enhanced visuals**, and **endless customization**—all while preserving the soul of vanilla gameplay. Built from the ground up by a single developer, this labor of love evolves with community feedback and a relentless focus on optimization without altering core gameplay.  

---

### **✨ Core Features**  

**1. Performance First**  
- **Lightning-Fast Rendering:** Powered by **Sodium**, **C2ME**, **Noisium**, and a suite of optimization mods.  
- **Intelligent Optimization:** Reduced lag spikes and faster chunk loading with minimal resource overhead.  
- **Flexible Settings:** Tweak visuals vs. performance with modular graphics presets.  
- **Revamped UI:** **Xander’s Sodium Options** overhauls the settings menu with a vanilla-friendly design, replacing Reese’s Sodium Options for a cleaner, OptiFine-like experience.  

**2. Tasteful Visual Upgrades**  
- **Subtle Animations:** Fluid hotbar transitions, UI polish, and ambient world details—no motion sickness, just immersion.  
- **Optimized Shaders:** GPU-friendly shaders with presets like **Ultra**, **Very High**, and seasonal addons like **Christmas** or **Spooky**.  
- **Ambient Details:** Particles for breaking hearts (damage effects), water ripples, and other immersive touches.  

**3. Modular & Future-Proof**  
- **Plug-and-Play Modding:** Add your favorite mods—whether it’s **Biomes O’ Plenty**, **Farmer’s Delight**, or beyond.  
- **Version Harmony:** Cross-version compatibility (1.21 ↔ Beta/Alpha/Classic/Snapshots/Bedrock) via **ViaFabricPlus**.  
- **Your Rules:** Fork, remix, or expand—just credit the original work.  

**4. OptiFine Alternatives**  
- **Connected Textures:** **Continuity** brings seamless block connections.  
- **Dynamic Features:** **Dynamic Lights**, **Smart Leaves**, capes, and more—all OptiFine staples, reimagined.  

**5. Built to Evolve**  
- **Upcoming Ports:** NeoForge (1.21.1) and 1.20.1 Fabric/Forge versions in development.  
- **Roadmap:** Translation support (90% complete) and broader device compatibility (VR pending).  

---

## **🚀 Future Plans**  
- **Multi-Loader Support:** NeoForge and 1.20.1 ports underway.  
- **Community-Driven Expansions:** Fork the modpack into themes like **"Minecraft Unleashed: Create"** or **"Minecraft Unleashed: Aether"**—creativity welcomed!  
- **Discord Hub:** Launching soon—share builds, suggest features, and beta-test updates!  

---

## **📋 FAQ**  

**Q: Can I modify this modpack?**  
A: Absolutely! Fork, remix, and share your creations—just credit the original and link back here.  

**Q: Will there be translations?**  
A: Already 90% translated! Full localization support arrives post-alpha.  

**Q: System requirements?**  
A: Runs smoothly on modern PCs. Not recommended for low-end systems when using heavy mods, but lightweight for vanilla-style play.  

**Q: How can I help?**  
A: Report bugs in the upcoming Discord server, suggest features, or fork the modpack!  

**Q: Bedrock Edition support?**  
A: Java-focused, but **ViaFabricPlus** allows joining Bedrock servers (enable in mod settings).  

---

## **⚠️ Important Notes**  
- **Alpha Status:** Some features (e.g., VR support) are WIP. Expect occasional quirks! 
- **Sudden Errors:** There may be crashes, nothing to worry about. Just wait for the next build update.

---

**Download now and rediscover your world!**
